---
title: "Final Report"
author: Helen Chen
output: html_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r, here-i-am, include = FALSE}
here::i_am(
  "Report.Rmd"
)
```

```{r, load-data, include = FALSE}
shoe_data <- read.csv(
  file = here::here("data/global_sports_footwear_sales_2018_2026.csv")
)
```

# Tabular Analysis:

```{r, table-1}
table_1 <- readRDS(
  file = here::here("output/table_1.rds"))
  
table_1
```

# Plots:

```{r, boxplots}
knitr::include_graphics(
  here::here("output/boxplot1.png")
)

knitr::include_graphics(
  here::here("output/boxplot2.png")
)
```

# LASSO applied for linear regression for feature selection:

```{r, feature-selection-lasso}
coeffs_for_model <- readRDS(
  file = here::here("output/model_coeffs.rds"))
  
coeffs_for_model
```

# Sample model with random intercept for units sold:

```{r, model1}
model1 <- readRDS(file = here::here("output/model1_summ.rds"))

model1
```
